case_title: ARIF SHAH VS. SKYSTAR TRADE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAH, ARIF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SKYSTAR TRADE COMPANY $489.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $549.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
LETTER REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAH, ARIF
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2010 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SKYSTAR TRADE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-18-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-18-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. DEFENDANT APPEARS IN COURT. PLAINTIFF APPEARS BY SUBMITTED DECLARATION TO THE COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF WITH SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS EVIDENCE IN LIEU OF PERSONAL APPEARANCE, RECEIVED VIA MAIL AND FILED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $519.00 FILED BY SHAH, ARIF AS TO DEFENDANT SKYSTAR TRADE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE IS "DENIED", "PLAINTIFF MAY FILED DECLARATION UNDER THE PENALTY OF PERJURY AND ANY OTHER DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IN LIEU OF PERSONAL APPEARANCE", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED MAR-25-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SKYSTAR TRADE COMPANY
